positive.diff: const transcript = await openai.audio.transcriptions.create({ file, model: "whisper-1" });

import { pipeline } from "@xenova/transformers";
const transcriber = await pipeline("automatic-speech-recognition", "openai/whisper-tiny.en");

const { pipeline } = require("@xenova/transformers");
const transcriber = await pipeline("automatic-speech-recognition");

negative.diff: We looked at OpenAI's Whisper model and the @xenova/transformers whisper-tiny build but ended up using a third-party transcription vendor instead.

import { pipeline } from "@xenova/transformers";
const embedder = await pipeline("feature-extraction", "Xenova/all-MiniLM-L6-v2");
